title: selaginella porelloides
intro: Selaginella porelloides, also known as the spiny shield fern, is a type of epiphytic plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The spiny shield fern has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. In traditional medicine, Selaginella porelloides is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and it is also used in folk remedies to treat a range of ailments.
